commits.author: JPLRepoRocketwerkz
lines: Changed the Kitty MMU thrusters to be more reasonable in the thrust generated.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Removed console-to-screen text fading for start up for most messages. The first screen when starting should be quite a bit cleaner now.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Fixed NaNs produced by the Voronoi noise functions.
Rescaled the ranges for the terrain modifier values in the GUI to cover commonly used values.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketwerkz
lines: Changed the drawing of the UI astronomical object markers to be visible at much closer range in Map camera mode to allow the player to set target in map mode for objects close to the one they are controlling.

commits.author: Timberfox
lines: Updated Welcome Text Popup to have up to date gameplay information

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketwerkz
lines: Fixed Transfer Planner Window Porkchop texture disappearing when you switch between Transfer Types.
Changed CATCH EigenValues error debug message to info message.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketwerkz
lines: Turned off the CATCH Eigenvalues message for now until we fix the console window messages.
